primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex -- Official Journal of the European Union

published: Annex V of EU AI Act -- EU Declaration of Conformity content

obligations.source_quote: The provider shall draw up a written machine readable, physical or electronically signed EU declaration of conformity for each high-risk AI system, and keep it at the disposal of the national competent authorities for 10 years after the high-risk AI system has been placed on the market or put into service.

decomposed_atoms.description: Must create written DoC for each high-risk AI system
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL draw up a written EU declaration of conformity for each high-risk AI system

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must be machine readable, physical or electronically signed
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL be machine readable, physical or electronically signed

decomposed_atoms.description: Must keep DoC for 10 years after market placement
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL keep at disposal of authorities for 10 years

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must identify the high-risk AI system it covers
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL identify the high-risk AI system for which it has been drawn up

decomposed_atoms.description: A copy must be submitted to authorities upon request
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL submit a copy to the relevant national competent authorities upon request

obligations.source_quote: The EU declaration of conformity shall state that the high-risk AI system concerned meets the requirements set out in Section 2. The EU declaration of conformity shall contain the information set out in Annex V, and shall be translated into a language that can be easily understood by the national competent authorities of the Member States in which the high-risk AI system is placed on the market or made available.

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must state system meets Section 2 requirements
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL state that the system meets Section 2 requirements

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must contain Annex V information
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL contain the information set out in Annex V

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must be translated into relevant languages
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL be translated into language understood by national competent authorities

obligations.source_quote: Where high-risk AI systems are subject to other Union harmonisation legislation which also requires an EU declaration of conformity, a single EU declaration of conformity shall be drawn up in respect of all Union law applicable to the high-risk AI system. The declaration shall contain all the information required to identify the Union harmonisation legislation to which the declaration relates.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies where multiple Union harmonisation laws require an EU declaration of conformity

decomposed_atoms.description: A single DoC must cover all applicable Union law
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL draw up a single EU declaration of conformity for all applicable Union law

decomposed_atoms.description: DoC must identify all applicable Union harmonisation legislation
decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL contain all the information required to identify the Union harmonisation legislation

obligations.source_quote: By drawing up the EU declaration of conformity, the provider shall assume responsibility for compliance with the requirements set out in Section 2. The provider shall keep the EU declaration of conformity up-to-date as appropriate.

decomposed_atoms.requirement: SHALL keep the EU declaration of conformity up-to-date
